name: Musical Aim Trainer
short_description: Musical Aim Trainer is here for you to train your aim and listen to music you choose that is getting worse or better depending on how good you are.There is also a bunch of settings to adjust the targets depending on your needs.
detailed_description:
Musical Aim Trainer is here to improve your aim. It focuses on doing so in the shortest amount of time.

You can convert sensitivity to a number of games, customize target distance, type, or speed.
The music you choose is playing depending on how you play: you shoot right and the music improves, otherwise, it gets worse.
There are 4 styles you can pick from: cyan, red, green, yellow, and 3 difficulties: easy, medium, and hard.
